message:
feat(core,state): Extend simulation types for plaque CA and evolution replay

Core simulation type extensions (packages/core/src/simulation.ts):

PlaqueAutomataState:
- Add infectionTimes: Float32Array to track per-cell infection age
- Enables proper latent period calculation per infected cell
- Required for realistic delayed lysis behavior

EvolutionReplayState:
- Add optional selection coefficient 's' to mutation objects
- Enables tracking beneficial/neutral/deleterious mutations
- Add neHistory: number[] for effective population size trajectory
- Supports coalescent skyline visualization of population dynamics

State management (packages/state/src/store.ts):
- Add 'transcriptionFlow' to OverlayId union type
- Placeholder for future TranscriptionFlowOverlay component

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
